name: The Peptide Watch, UK research-peptide vendor audit
license: CC BY 4.0, free to cite with attribution to The Peptide Watch
headline_finding: Just 9% of active UK research-peptide sellers (28 of 298 audited) publish their own verifiable independent lab certificate of analysis; the other 91% (270 sellers) show none, borrowed, self-made, or unverifiable COAs.
